promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: The previously queued companion overlay batch already had a narrowed A2-mid child, so this was selected as the next real unresolved refined-fuel term-conflict parent without an A2-mid reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the build-order lineage, two-trigram scaffold, direct axis semantic overloads, eight-stage inflation point, and self-diagnosed conflation signal.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The Axes Master A2-mid batch was used to keep partial roadmap alignment distinct from the older note's stronger semantic claims.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the next sibling stage-side precursor once the order/trigram note was reduced.
Deferred until the broader engine/stage split packet was reduced first.
Deferred until the earlier build-order and stage-side precursor drift was narrowed.

raw_source_reread_reason: A fresh reread of the raw note was used to preserve the exact 'correct global axis order' rhetoric, the two-trigram split wording, and the note's own explanation of prior conflation.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the note's strongest reusable lineage, nonconflation, and scope-guard value without importing its unstable direct axis semantics.
They remain small, comparison-ready, and proposal-side for later axis-family reconciliation work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain live axis-semantic conflicts or self-authorizing overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after reading the companion A2-mid refinement process.
Used the Axes Master A2-mid batch only as a comparison anchor for roadmap-vs-semantics separation.
A fresh raw-source reread was used for exact wording because the reduction goal depended on how strongly the note self-locked its order and repair language.
